cards.name: Block
cards.description: Engage a selected enemy army in this hex (no additional effect yet).

cards.name: Doors of Night
cards.description: Grants Courage to all Dark Servants units for 1 turn and dispels Dawn.

cards.name: Dawn
cards.description: Grants Courage to all Free People units for 1 turn and dispels Doors of Night.

cards.name: Sun
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all Humans and Hobbits for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: Long Shadows
cards.description: Environmental event. Grants Courage to all beasts for 1 turn.

cards.name: Caradhras
cards.description: Environmental event. Freezes enemy units on mountain tiles in radius 5.

cards.name: Cruel Winter
cards.description: Environmental event. All mountain enemy units have 7.5% chance to become Frozen.

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.description: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked units.

cards.name: Sand Storm
cards.description: Environmental event. Halts all non-Southron units on desert tiles.

cards.name: AssassinateCharacter
cards.description: Attempt to assassinate an enemy character.

cards.name: ABookOfLostMagic
cards.description: Reveal hidden artifacts in radius 2 and gain +1 Mage for 1 turn.
